goal: true parity mac Qwen3.6 vs raw llama.cpp; then dogfood the 5-10x value with ultracode (multi-agent) mode
orchestrator_host: windows/amd64 (no Apple Silicon, no NVIDIA GPU, no 27B artifact)
honesty_note: Per docs/proofs/00-METHOD.md: a SKIP is not a PASS. The agent-orchestration concurrency factor below is a DIFFERENT axis from fak's inference 5-10x (BENCHMARK-AUTHORITY.md) and is never blended with it. Durations are each subagent's self-reported wall time; the orchestration windows are the measured spans.

metric_definition.concurrency_factor_wallclock: sum(successful agent durations) / max(successful agent duration) in one window = how much serial agent-work was compressed into the window's wall-clock
metric_definition.deliverable_count_throughput: number of independent, reviewed, correct (non-stub) deliverables landed via concurrent agents vs one-at-a-time; a SKIP/policy-blocked lane counts as 0

wave_1_production.purpose: advance Qwen3.6-vs-llama.cpp parity (host-independent slice) via 4 concurrent disjoint-lane agents
wave_1_production.note: wall-clock multiple capped by lane imbalance (647s vs 150s) exactly as the Amdahl caveat in the explainer predicts

wave_2_verification.purpose: independent pre-ship verification of wave-1 artifacts via 5 concurrent disjoint-lane agents (hardening, not rubber-stamp)

agents.verdict: PASS: 13/13 test names resolve, 18/18 links resolve, no stray 6.12, commit hashes consistent; no edits
PASS: all qwen35.go symbols+line ranges accurate, mRoPE-refutation test+assertion real, phenomenon facts match source; no edits
PASS: bash -n clean, every CLI flag confirmed defined, SKIP!=PASS holds, text->ids gap documented not invented; no edits
PASS: 7/7 links + 5/5 packages resolve, separation law intact, no fan-out contradiction; no edits

SKIP: subagent Bash refused (POLICY_BLOCK/TERMINAL); no build verdict produced. Counts as 0 deliverables. Host-independent green TestQwen35HybridViaMMMatchesCPUTemplate is a prior committed witness (cited).

parity_outcome.correctness_parity: PROVEN at arch level (tiny qwen3_5 fixture bit-exact vs HF, cosine 1.000000); REFUTED at 27B scale (token-3 near-tie argmax flip: fak [248068,198,8160] vs llama.cpp [248068,198,90700]). Diagnosed as kernel-numerics divergence on the hybrid GDN path; prime suspect = the GDN delta-rule recurrent scan (the only stateful op). See experiments/qwen36/token3-drift-investigation-2026-06-28.md
parity_outcome.speed_parity: not yet: fak M3 Pro single-stream decode 0.1->0.9->1.2 tok/s vs the 7.29 tok/s llama.cpp-Metal bar (~6x under); wall diagnosed as command-buffer launch overhead, kernels bit-correct; closing levers Apple-Silicon-gated
parity_outcome.gated_residual: the Mac M3 Pro fakmetal GPU-numerics + on-device tok/s witnesses (and the 27B correctness localization) need an Apple-Silicon host this orchestrator does not have; one-command gate authored at tools/qwen36_mac_parity_gate.sh

fak_inference_value_separate_axis.note: fak's documented 5-10x is an INFERENCE axis, not this agent-orchestration concurrency. Cited, never blended.
examples_from_BENCHMARK_AUTHORITY: README headline 50-turn x 5-agent reuse 60.3x vs naive / 4.1x vs tuned
